text.message: I hate being attached to the person with the best setup on all ends 😂
No way I’d win that against red
if you think that you are a very weak plater
I must be a weak player then
maybe not weak just trash talker
Red got him with the propaganda
And you ask for that card
you talk your way into wining
Blue I hope you make it to 10/5
Need to be blocking the lumber
The propaganda machine is in full throttle from you red
Remeber when you said I was weak for pointing out that your clearly ahead
Blue I can give you brick to get to 10/5
It’ll help you secure long road
Why the lower probability number with less settlements?
Orange can you get road? Lol
I’m not keeping road blues gonna take it
Red is still the one in front
It’s crazy tall have more cities than me.
I can give you road blues
Bro he just needs one road
I had all brick to trade
How lumber do you have now?
I have brick I can give
Blue do you play very often ?
No he asked me if I play often
It’s just the amount of choices you’ve made that are in lack of strategegy is outstanding 😂
He can build three roads easy
Just need his lumber to roll once
im blocked and dont have eniugh brick
looks like the un tactical gonna win
We can trade back and forth
so oj wins as i predicted
Blue you are hilarious bad at this game
I saved the game just now
Red did you run out of roads😂
Oh lol he has no roads
Unlucky  guys I think black might win
